'''zhazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:judgmentally|judgmentally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:judgmentally|judgmentally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhazate|zhazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhazatesher|zhazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazatesherĂ«m|zhazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhazatero|zhazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhazateshĂ«|zhazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazateshĂ«m|zhazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhazatero|gokizhazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhazateshĂ«|gokizhazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhazateshĂ«m|gokizhazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhazankerom|gozhazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhazankeshĂ«|gozhazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhazankeshĂ«m|gozhazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhazankeya|gozhazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhazaterom|zhazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazatemu|zhazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhazateya|zhazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhazaterom|gokizhazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhazatemu|gokizhazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhazateya|gokizhazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhazazate|zhazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhazazatesher|zhazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazazatesherĂ«m|zhazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhazazatero|zhazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhazazateshĂ«|zhazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazazateshĂ«m|zhazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhazazatero|gokizhazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhazazateshĂ«|gokizhazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhazazateshĂ«m|gokizhazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhazazankerom|gozhazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhazazankeshĂ«|gozhazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhazazankeshĂ«m|gozhazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhazazankeya|gozhazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhazazaterom|zhazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhazazatemu|zhazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhazazateya|zhazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhazazaterom|gokizhazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhazazatemu|gokizhazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhazazateya|gokizhazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠzĂŠte|zhĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠzĂŠtesher|zhĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠzĂŠtero|zhĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠzĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠzĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠzĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠzĂŠterom|zhĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠzĂŠtemu|zhĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠzĂŠteya|zhĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠzĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠzĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafzafte|zhafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafzaftesher|zhafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafzaftesherĂ«m|zhafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafzaftero|zhafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafzafteshĂ«|zhafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafzafteshĂ«m|zhafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafzaftero|gokizhafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafzafteshĂ«|gokizhafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafzafteshĂ«m|gokizhafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafzafnkerom|gozhafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafzafnkeshĂ«|gozhafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafzafnkeshĂ«m|gozhafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafzafnkeya|gozhafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafzafterom|zhafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafzaftemu|zhafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafzafteya|zhafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafzafterom|gokizhafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafzaftemu|gokizhafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafzafteya|gokizhafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
